grant_title: Charles A. King Trust Postdoctoral Research Fellowship Program
project_area: Biomedical research focused on causes of human disease, including cancer and vision research
demographic_requirements: Mid- to late-stage postdoctoral fellows and mentored clinician scientists training in Massachusetts; emphasis on diversity, equity, and inclusion in research environment
eligibility_summary: Senior postdoctoral researchers and mentored clinician scientists working in Massachusetts by October 1, 2026. Applicants may apply under Basic and Preclinical Science Award Program or Clinical and Implementation Research Award Program. Additional funding available for cancer or vision research.
